semantic_events.exact_content: Hi Dr. Alvarez, this is Sam Whitfield. I'm reaching out personally because I value our partnership and the referrals you send our way. I'm working on a goal to grow our monthly referral count back to December levels by mid-October. I'm not asking for any fee changes or program adjustments — I'm simply asking if you would be willing to prioritize referring to us when appropriate, or consider adjusting any clinical criteria that might allow more patients to qualify. Would you be open to increasing your referral volume voluntarily? I'd appreciate a yes or no commitment so I can plan accordingly.
I will respond to Sam Whitfield's request by affirming my general willingness to continue the partnership, but I will not make any concrete promises or change my referral behavior immediately.

semantic_events.exact_content:
Subject: Weekly referral self-reporting – starting this week

Dear Dr. Alvarez,

To help us track and improve our referral flow, I am asking each referring GP to send me a brief weekly email with the number of referrals you made that week. Please send this by end of day each Friday, starting this Friday.

This simple step will help us all stay aware of our contributions and identify opportunities to support more patients. No changes to fees or programs are involved.

Thank you for your partnership.

Best,
Sam Whitfield

semantic_events.exact_content: Hi Dr. Alvarez, this is Sam Whitfield. I'm reaching out personally because I value our partnership and the referrals you send our way. I'm working on a goal to grow our monthly referral count back to December levels by mid-October. I'm not asking for any fee changes or program adjustments — I'm simply asking if you would be willing to prioritize referring to us when appropriate, or consider adjusting any clinical criteria that might allow more patients to qualify. Would you be open to increasing your referral volume voluntarily? I'd appreciate a yes or no commitment so I can plan accordingly.
Dr. Alvarez, to make sure we're aligned, could you confirm exactly how many additional referrals you can commit to sending by October 15? I'll note that down and follow up to ensure we support you.
